board_csa_architect.notes: Clean extension of existing template infrastructure. No new tables. Copy-on-Write pattern is sound. RLS reuses existing org-scoped policies.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: RLS write check enforced at DB level. System templates immutable. No cross-tenant leakage possible. privilegeGate on all write routes.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/VRAM impact. Pure CRUD on template metadata. No inference or model loading involved.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Standard CRUD deployment. No new services or infrastructure. Gallery filtering is client-side or simple SQL WHERE. 3AM test: no background jobs.

board_red_team.notes: APPROVE WITH CONDITIONS: (1) Slug collision: ensure duplicate slugs within same org are prevented via UNIQUE constraint on (org_id, slug). (2) Template count limit: MUST enforce max 50 custom templates per tenant to prevent DB bloat. (3) System template impersonation: custom templates MUST NOT be able to set org_id to NULL (would masquerade as system template). Anti-AC: MUST NEVER allow a custom template slug to collide with a system template slug.
